title: King Prawns with Algerian Tagine Sauce
description: A flavorful North African-inspired dish featuring king prawns in a rich and aromatic tagine sauce. Serve over couscous or rice for a hearty meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes and chicken broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Add the king prawns to the skillet and cook until pink and cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve the prawns and sauce over couscous or rice.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
